extortion.description: McKibbin Commercial are one of the leading firms of Chartered Surveyors, Estate Agents & Valuers in Northern Ireland.  The Company was founded in Belfast in 1902 by Frederick McKibbin and we continue to provide a wide range of property services including sales, lettings, valuations, lease renewals, rent reviews and other property consultancy to a wide-ranging clientele to include individual landlords and tenants, businesses, institutions and public sector organizations.
